{{Quote|That was the ''By'ynium'', Lench's ship. He was a good captain. Good crew on that vessel.|Republic captain Quegh on the destruction of the ''By'ynium'' during the Battle of Praesitlyn|<ref name="JT" />}}
'''Lench''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He captained the [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] ''[[By'ynium]]'' during the [[Battle of Praesitlyn]], and was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] was destroyed.

==History==
Around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] launched an [[Battle of Praesitlyn|attack]] on [[Praesitlyn/Legends|Praesitlyn]]. Lench was part of a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Navy/Legends|Navy]] [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] sent to retake the planet, commanding the [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] ''[[By'ynium]]''. As the [[Ranger (Centax-class)|''Ranger'']], a [[Centax-class heavy frigate|''Centax''-class heavy frigate]] serving as the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], launched the first salvo on the Confederacy forces, the ''By'ynium'' was hit by the CIS counterattack and destroyed. The [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Death/Legends|died]] in the explosion, [[Gender/Legends|his]] death witnessed by Captain [[Quegh]] and [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Nejaa Halcyon]] on the bridge of the ''Ranger''.<ref name="JT" />

==Personality and traits==
Lench was a highly competent captain and commanded an equally efficient crew—at least, according to fellow [[Officer/Legends|officer]] Quegh, who lamented Lench's death.<ref name="JT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Lench made his first and only appearance in ''[[Jedi Trial]]'', the fourth [[List of novels by release date|novel]] in the [[Clone Wars multimedia project]], written by [[David Sherman]] and [[Dan Cragg]].<ref name="JT" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Trial]]'' {{1st}}
